docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STANDARD PARKING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATHIE, KIMBERLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STANDARD PARKING THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S CAUSED THE FAILURE OF THE CAR BATTERY.
